objective: Implement canonical queue order, queue snapshots, queue entries, and reviewer-fit suggestions without mutating canonical order for staffing heuristics.
forbiddenLocalShortcuts: Do not rewrite canonical row order from reviewer-fit heuristics.
Do not depend on sibling runtime implementations for launch permission; consume only the seq_230 interface contracts until merge.
Do not infer overload honesty from UI copy alone.
mandatoryTests: same input set produces identical queue rank order and snapshot hash
reviewer-fit suggestions change assignment hints only, not queue order
duplicate invalidation triggers queue recompute with explicit provenance
buffered or preview-only workspace trust does not silently mutate canonical queue order
failClosedConditions: Missing constants registry or unsupported scoring version blocks queue recompute.
Attempt to rewrite canonical rank from assignment suggestion path blocks settlement.
temporarySeams: Compile against the IF_230_TRIAGE_RUNTIME_KERNEL and IF_230_WORKSPACE_TRUST_PROJECTIONS interface ids rather than waiting for sibling runtime code.
